subject: WM-0164 blocked
body: WM-0164 requires SIM_SCHEMA_VERSION=3 and schema-v2 fail-closed plus pnpm quality, but apps/web/src/simulation-worker-session.test.ts still hardcodes/emits schemaVersion 2. Full quality fails 3 tests (expected schema 2 and two helper timeouts after schema-2 messages are correctly rejected). That file is outside WM-0164 allowedPaths and ADR-0017 forbids a schema-2 compatibility workaround. Add the focused apps/web test path to allowedPaths or land a separate schema-3 consumer-test update, then unblock.
